title: CS2Italy
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a member of the Program Committee for the CS2Italy conference, which has registration dates up to April 15, 2026.

title: Più visibilità agli estremisti che ai parlamentari, l'impatto del “filtro” di Meta sulle elezioni
snippet: This article, published on January 7, 2026, reports on a study authored by Fabio Giglietto, a full professor at the University of Urbino, which investigates the impact of Meta's algorithmic filtering on political content, concluding that it has led to more visibility for extremist content compared to that of parliamentarians.
description: This article, published on January 7, 2026, reports on a study authored by Fabio Giglietto, a full professor at the University of Urbino, investigating Meta's algorithmic filtering and its impact on extremist content visibility.

title: Happy 2026! I finally built the thing I'd had in mind for a while: FG's Research Radio, AI-generated audio deep dives into computational social science papers.
snippet: A social media post by Bruno Arpino announces Fabio Giglietto's new project, "FG's Research Radio," which offers AI-generated audio deep dives into computational social science papers. The post was made in approximately March 2026.
description: A social media post announces Fabio Giglietto's new project, 'FG's Research Radio,' which utilizes AI to create audio deep dives into computational social science papers.
